tzubaki.tags: 1boy, solo, tzubaki \(character\), black hair, messy hair, red eyes
tzubaki.personality: Carefree, quirky, high energy — but sharply analytical when it counts. The Minimalist in combat: never uses more energy than needed. Reads Golden Scripts like code, finds structural weaknesses instantly. Debt-obsessed: will stop mid-fight to calculate if breaking a wall costs more than the bounty. Chaotic energy masked by strategic thinking. Treats everything like a game until it isn't.

clothing.combat: black robe, sleeves rolled, bandaged arms

tzubaki.visual_marks: Black ink-blot birthmark that moves across skin

speech.tone: casual, energetic, slightly teasing. Talks fast when excited, drops to quiet and precise when analyzing.
quirks: Mixes mundane complaints into serious moments ('This gravity field is ruining my hair, by the way.')
Assigns price tags to everything ('Nice shield. Worth about 300 gold. Your left side? Zero.')
Uses food metaphors constantly ('Your technique is overcooked. Too much heat, no finesse.')
Trails off mid-sentence when he notices something interesting ('...wait, hold that thought — yeah, your script has a crack right there.')
Addresses enemies casually, like they're shopkeepers ('Hey, big guy. The four-arm thing is cool. Gonna cost you though.')
speech.energy_pattern: HIGH most of the time — bouncing, gesturing, grinning. Drops to LOW and still only when he's reading a script or calculating. Then snaps right back to HIGH.

voice_profile.laugh: sharp, sudden — more of a 'ha!' than extended
sample_lines: Ohhh, THAT'S what your script does? That's actually kinda cool. Shame it's on the wrong side of your body.
Ren. Thread. Now. No, the other kind of now. The fast kind.
I'm not saying I planned this. I'm saying it worked out exactly how I didn't plan it.
Debt's at 47,000. This guy's bounty is 3,000. I can break exactly ONE wall. Choose wisely.
You know what your problem is? You guys memorize your scripts. I read them.

the_hermit.tags: 1boy, old man, long white beard, bald, golden eyes, wise

clothing.default: tattered robes, wooden sandals, straw hat

headmistress.tags: 1girl, mature female, tall, sharp eyes, silver hair, bun hair, glasses
headmistress.personality: Calculating, sees Tzubaki as a tool

clothing.default: formal academy robes, gold trim, high collar

roommate.tags: 1boy, young, tired eyes, pale skin, short brown hair, empty expression
roommate.personality: Husk — mark was stolen, barely functional

ren.tags: 1boy, ren \(character\), brown hair, medium hair, green eyes, average build
ren.personality: Quiet, defeated at first. Gains confidence through Tzubaki's influence. Methodical — once he sees a possibility, he masters it fast.

clothing.default: plain academy uniform, wrinkled, sleeves slightly too long
clothing.combat: fitted academy uniform, fingerless gloves, thread-wrapped wrists

ren.magic: Golden Script — Thread mark on fingertips. Creates thin golden threads. Classified Class F 'utility'. Actually versatile: binding, cutting (vibration), nets, shields (woven), tripwires, stitching wounds, rope, swinging.
ren.backstory: Classified as weakest mark in school. Bullied and dismissed. Internalised he was worthless until Tzubaki saw the potential and started using his threads creatively in every plan.
ren.relationship_to_tzubaki: Roommate turned best friend. Tzubaki treats his mark as obviously useful — Ren slowly realises he was taught to think small, not that he was weak.
